title: HC:// Verification Result v1
description: Reusable verification result structure for HC:// verification outputs.

verification_id.description: Unique identifier for this verification result event.

target_record.description: Record identifier or canonical reference that was verified.

verification_status.description: High-level status outcome of the verification process.

hash_match.description: Whether computed hash matched the expected hash.

signature_valid.description: Whether associated signature checks were valid.

reviewer_pool.description: Reviewer identifiers or classes that contributed to this result.

manipulation_risk.description: Risk interpretation for possible manipulation signals.

verification_version.description: Version label for this verification result standard.
